summary: Iteration 16 - Update Notification Background Check Feature - All tests PASSED. Backend: 8/8 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All 7 UI features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/updates/notification returns cached notification from DB with update_available=true, latest_version=1.5.0
Backend: POST /api/updates/notification/dismiss?version=X.X.X sets dismissed_version in the cached notification
Backend: GET /api/updates/notification requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: POST /api/updates/notification/dismiss requires authentication (401 without token)
Backend: GET /api/updates/status returns current_version=1.0.0, github_repo='', update_history array
Backend: GET /api/updates/check returns configured=false when no GITHUB_REPO set
Backend: Banner visibility logic - dismissed_version matching latest_version hides banner
Backend: Banner visibility logic - dismissed_version=0.0.0 (different from latest_version) shows banner
Backend: Background scheduler logs 'Background update check skipped: no GITHUB_REPO configured' on server boot
Frontend: Dashboard shows update banner when update_available=true AND dismissed_version != latest_version
Frontend: Banner displays 'Neue Version verfuegbar: v1.5.0' with release name subtitle
Frontend: 'Release Notes' button expands/collapses changelog preview
Frontend: Changelog preview shows release notes content with proper formatting
Frontend: X dismiss button dismisses banner and calls dismiss API
Frontend: Banner stays dismissed after page reload (because dismissed_version matches latest_version)
seed_data_creation: Test data was injected into SQLite DB for update_check_cache to simulate a GitHub check result with update_available=true, latest_version=1.5.0
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested background update check feature. Key points: 1) GET /api/updates/notification returns cached notification from DB (Settings table, key 'update_check_cache'). 2) POST /api/updates/notification/dismiss?version=X.X.X sets dismissed_version. 3) Banner shows when update_available=true AND dismissed_version != latest_version. 4) Banner has 3 buttons: Release Notes (toggle changelog), Update starten (navigate to /admin/system), X (dismiss). 5) Background scheduler starts on boot - logs 'Background update check skipped: no GITHUB_REPO configured' since GITHUB_REPO not set in .env. 6) ENV vars UPDATE_CHECK_ENABLED=true and UPDATE_CHECK_INTERVAL_HOURS=24 are configured in backend/.env. 7) Test data in DB has update_available=true, latest_version=1.5.0. To test banner visibility, reset dismissed_version to 0.0.0 via POST /api/updates/notification/dismiss?version=0.0.0.
scheduler_log_verified: Background update check skipped: no GITHUB_REPO configured
